5 Basketball players were arrested last night as suspects in the murder of student James McMalin. James was a freshman basketball player. James was last seen in the same room as them at the same house party. Witnesses say that 5 of those star players were the last people seen with James. The students are currently being questioned.

Update:

The students have been released and will not be spending jail time. At the time they are still suspects.
